risks.title: Test fixture must mock graph.json + embedding service correctly

decision_records.decision: No prod code change — orchestrator already correct
decision_records.rationale: indexing-orchestrator.ts:748-749 already conditionally spreads layer into VectorRecord.metadata. Adding a test is the correct action; changing prod code would be a no-op or regression.

decision_records.decision: Use existing test file __tests__/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.test.ts rather than creating a new file
decision_records.rationale: The AC-05/AC-06 describe blocks already test facet surfaces. A new describe block for layer-propagation-e2e fits naturally in the same file and avoids test infrastructure duplication.
